title: Creamy Syrian Pasta Bake
description: A delicious and easy-to-make pasta bake with a creamy Syrian twist, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook the bowtie pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat. Add the cooked pasta and stir to combine with the creamy tomato sauce.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a greased 9x13-inch baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is lightly golden brown.
